generated_oml:
instance BcsTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor within Building Control System for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BcsHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor within Building Control System for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance BcsPressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Pressure sensor within Building Control System for mechanical system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RealTimeSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance RealTimeSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BcsTemperatureSensor, BcsHumiditySensor, BcsPressureSensor
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental and mechanical system data from Building Control System sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularAnalyticsEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance BimBcsSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM model enriched with semantic definitions of BCS components for unified semantic foundation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MdeEnabler
]

instance CustomAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Custom analytical models integrated via modular extension points for evolving operational requirements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance MdeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering enabler for automatic generation of Digital Twin artifacts from BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArtifactGenerationService
]

instance ModularAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture for integrating custom analytical services to adapt to changing operational requirements"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization enabler for monitoring and control operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of deployable Digital Twin artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeployedArtifactInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems for continuous operational oversight"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance scheduling and energy efficiency optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceInsight, EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system state information for facility managers to monitor building operations"
]

instance MaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts based on equipment health analysis"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Energy usage optimization insights for reducing operational costs"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational process optimization insights for improved building performance"
]

instance DeployedArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deployed Digital Twin artifact configuration for system integration"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building system spanning entire life cycle from design to refurbishment"
    base:contains StructuralElement, MechanicalSystem, OperationalInfrastructure
]

instance StructuralElement : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building structural elements including beams, columns, and foundations"
]

instance MechanicalSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "HVAC, plumbing, and electrical mechanical systems within the building"
]

instance OperationalInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operational infrastructure such as lighting, security, and access control systems"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle includes initial device modeling within BIM environments where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation of enriched BIM models into structured representations, automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts, real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular integration of custom services to support operational evolution."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework employs standardized extension points within its modular architecture to ensure interoperability and facilitate the integration of custom services and analytics."
]
